items.title: Dr. Muneeb Shah's Remedy Raises $20M Series A - Clinical Skincare Investment Surge
items.summary: Remedy, derm-founded clinical skincare brand by Dr. Muneeb Shah (social media dermatologist), raises $20M Series A led by L Catterton and Norwest Venture Partners. Signals: mass-market clinical skincare backed by doctor credibility is attracting top-tier VC investment. Keywords: doctor-founded, clinical efficacy, mass-market, serums, brightening.

items.title: Bubble Skincare Founder on Gen Alpha Strategy - Accessible Youth Skincare Trend
items.summary: Bubble skincare (founder Shai Eisenman) winning Gen Z and Gen Alpha at mass retailers CVS, Target, Walmart. Product: Cosmic Mist and accessible skincare. Trend: younger consumers experiencing beauty fatigue, prefer simple routines. Brand not selling. Available at major mass retailers. Price: accessible, $15-25.

items.title: Saie Clean Makeup Brand Launches Education Program 'The Makeup Class' for Superfan Loyalty
items.summary: Clean beauty makeup brand Saie debuts 'The Makeup Class' IRL masterclass program expanding to new cities. Strategy: in-person education converts customers into superfans. Signals: experiential marketing and clean makeup education gaining traction in North American beauty market.

items.title: More Than Nine: Derm-Founded Pregnancy-Safe Skincare for Moms Tackles Decision Fatigue
items.summary: Derm brand More Than Nine by Aegean Chan targets moms with simplified pregnancy-safe skincare routines. Addresses 'decision fatigue' in beauty. Niche: maternal skincare, ingredient safety, clean formulations. Growing segment: dermatologist-founded brands targeting specific life stages.
